revision.content:
My project listing, probably always out of date.

=== Done / Mostly working ===
* [[BirdhouseCam]]
* [https://github.com/dosman33/rtl433-mon rtl433-mon] - Some scripts to make it easier to passively monitor 433MHz ISM band sensors (vehicle tire pressure sensors, remote-keyless-entry signals, etc)
* [[Cherokee CBS1000 Mic adapter]] - The wiring diagram for hooking up a 4pin or 5pin mic to this non-standard 5pin jack
* [[Hesine M-505 3D printer mods]] - Very similar to the Anet A8, but different
* [[Solar filter for a 10" Dob Telescope]]
* [[Telescope Solar Finder]]
* [[Lasered acrylic con badges]]
* [[Training]] - I'm working on making training materials available for our shop equipment
* [[Laser etched rubber stamps]]
* [[CCTV Network]] - our in-space TV network
* [[Audio Network]] - our speaker system which reaches into most rooms in the space
* [[Gin pole welding project]]
* [[Atlas Lathe Restoration]]
* [[InkShield_Project]]
* [[Lockpicking_contest_system]] - AKA Rumble Challenge lock picking + drinking game
* [[Electric_firework_firing_system]]
* [[Electrolysis Rust Removal System]]
* [[Vacuum_forming_table]]
* [[Laser Interferometer]] - Will's project, I assisted on this (back when our meetings were held in Jenett's basement)

=== Projects I've documented on other sites ===
* [https://www.thingiverse.com/dosman33/designs Thingiverse 3D models I've made]
* [https://www.instructables.com/member/dosman33/ My Instructables] - most of these were for hackathons
* [https://github.com/dosman33 Github] - Occasionally I do some script/code related projects


=== Active projects and ToDo List ===
* [[Bloomington Meshtastic]] - Tracking Meshtastic activity in Bloomington
* [[Gadget Hamper]] - The Universal Device Charging Cradle
* [[Building an RF Receiving Station]] - Some of us have been working on this project together
* [[SatNOGS no-rotator Ground Station]] - SatNOGS client connected to stationary antennas
* [[SatNOGS Ground Station v3]] - Version 3 rotator ground station
* [[SatNOGS Ground Station v2]] - Satellite tracking and receiving station
* [[Radio Activities]] - A page to track all radio activities at Bloominglabs. Ham, CB, Wi-Fi mesh, part15, etc.
* [[Water Heater Monitoring and Setback Control]]
* [[Eaton Home Heartbeat]] - reclaiming discontinued home monitoring gear
* [[Wintermute]] - a joint project between Steve and myself
* [[Radar sign]]
* [[Arduino_AC_Remote]]
* [[PCB Etching]]

* Galvanic Vestibular Stimulation: recreate the results of NTT Communication Science Laboratories with remote-controlled humans
** Prototype built based on Arduino's and [http://www.sparkfun.com/products/8948 these RX/][http://www.sparkfun.com/products/8945 TX RF boards]
** Papers and media pertaining to GVS:
** [http://www.youtube.com/watch?v=OlXYqfQHNuA&feature=related YouTube video of GVS used to remote control a human]
** [http://delivery.acm.org/10.1145/1190000/1187315/p17-maeda.pdf?key1=1187315&key2=6981350921&coll=DL&dl=ACM&CFID=112087327&CFTOKEN=73009114 PDF: Shaking The World: Galvanic Vestibular Stimulation As A Novel Sensation Interface]
** [http://jp.physoc.org/content/500/Pt_3/661.full.pdf Human body-segment tilts induced by galvanic stimulation: a vestibularly driven balance protection mechanism]
* CES device advancements
** voodoo magick box equivalent based on attiny13
***done, more tweaking to do yet though
* SLM+CES combo device
* wearable RF sensory devices (for use with the TI Chronos when it arrives)
** attiny with RF receiver and cell phone motor attached to an arm-band
* True North belt - research phase (Steve has working prototype built, see his project page)
** http://feelspace.cogsci.uni-osnabrueck.de/en/index.html

=== Some day list ===
* arduino ps/2 keyboard - to facilitate alternative input controls to software that accepts only keyboard inputs / for stand alone operation
* ferrofluid

=== Miscellaneous one-offs ===
These are some simple things I've done that don't each require their own page.
* [[dosmans miscellaneious projects]]
